durable_improvement: Added a deterministic, idempotent, fail-closed workflow rewriter that wires the atomic deployment-evidence finalizer into the authoritative Cloudflare workflow without replacing shared state.
blocker: The cloudflare-research GitHub environment still requires valid CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN values before the authoritative workflow can deploy and prove a resolving hostname.
next_action: Run the committed rewriter against .github/workflows/cloudflare-pages-research.yml, review and commit the resulting workflow-only diff, then dispatch the workflow after credentials are configured.
